VSTCameraRotation.description:
Camera rotation offset. Quaternions are preferred when present; Euler
angles are retained for import of older scenario JSON.

YAW.description: Yaw angle in degrees for Euler-angle camera imports.

PITCH.description: Pitch angle in degrees for Euler-angle camera imports.

ROLL.description: Roll angle in degrees for Euler-angle camera imports.

QUATERNION_X.description: Quaternion x component for camera orientation.

QUATERNION_Y.description: Quaternion y component for camera orientation.

QUATERNION_Z.description: Quaternion z component for camera orientation.

QUATERNION_W.description: Quaternion w component for camera orientation.

USES_QUATERNION.description: True when quaternion fields define the authoritative rotation.

VSTDisplaySettings.description: App display toggles for a scenario viewer.

MAP_MODE.description: Active map rendering mode for the scenario viewer.

SHOW_GIF_CONTROLS.description: Show animated capture or GIF export controls.

SHOW_ATMOSPHERE.description: Render the atmospheric shell around the central body.

USE_STITCHED_ORBIT.description: Render orbits as stitched continuous paths.

VSTCameraOptions.description: Camera options for a space-domain scenario viewer.

CAMERA_FRAME_MODE.description: Camera frame relative to the focused target or default scene.

SATELLITE_ALIGNMENT.description: Satellite body alignment mode when focused on a satellite.

DISTANCE_FROM_TARGET.description: Camera distance from the current target in kilometers.

VST.description: Viewer State - display and camera state associated with a scenario.

CAMERA.description: Camera settings for the current viewer state.

DISPLAY_SETTINGS.description: Display toggles and map style for the current viewer state.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_ID.description: Reference id of the currently focused scenario object.

FOCUSED_REFERENCE_INDEX.description: Zero-based focused reference index, or -1 when no index is focused.
